name: a2-assessment-platform
description: Internal assessment platform backend bootstrap (M0 foundation).

scripts.pretest: dotenv -e .env.test -- tsx src/scripts/resetDatabase.ts && dotenv -e .env.test -- tsx src/scripts/applyMigrations.ts && dotenv -e .env.test -- tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.test:integration:local: dotenv -e .env.test -- vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts test/m1-core-flow.test.ts test/m2-participant-results-history.test.ts test/assessment-policy.integration.test.ts test/m2-manual-review.test.ts test/m2-appeal-flow.test.ts test/m2-admin-content-publication.test.ts test/m2-calibration-workspace.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:review: dotenv -e .env.test -- vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts test/m2-manual-review.test.ts test/m2-appeal-flow.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:admin: dotenv -e .env.test -- vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts test/m2-admin-content-publication.test.ts test/m2-calibration-workspace.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:contracts: dotenv -e .env.test -- vitest run test/participant-console-config.test.ts test/workspace-html-fallbacks.test.js test/workspace-validation-accessibility.test.js test/admin-content-translations.test.js test/participant-translations.test.js test/calibration-translations.test.js test/participant-completed-translations.test.js
